boundaryStatement: This artifact records a small stronger-side boundary sweep beyond the locally robust nhm2_shift_lapse selected-family bracket. It does not replace canonical baseline latest aliases and does not widen speed, ETA, viability, gravity, or horizon claims.

marginFromReferenceProfile.note: No first-failure boundary was reached within the tested stronger bracket. Relative to stage1_centerline_alpha_0p995_v1, the tested stronger-side passing margin extends through stage1_centerline_alpha_0p8800_v1.

marginFromStrongestPassingProfile.note: No first-failure boundary was reached beyond stage1_centerline_alpha_0p8800_v1 within the tested stronger bracket.

effectVsHeadroomInterpretation: The bounded timing differential grows monotonically within the tested stronger-side bracket while low-expansion threshold usage remains flat and wall-safety threshold usage remains flat within the tested bracket. Raw headroom signals remain flat within the tested bracket.
boundarySummary: No first-failure boundary was reached within the tested stronger bracket. Through stage1_centerline_alpha_0p8800_v1, every tested stronger-side profile remained gate-admitted, and the bounded timing differential scales monotonic within the passing region. The current predefined exploration stop is stage1_centerline_alpha_0p8800_v1.
